latest.title: Agentic Branding: Let Kiro Turn Your CV into a Cloud-Native Website
latest.description: In this guide, I am going to use AWS Kiro (the intelligent AI agent) to automate a professional transformation. I'll take your existing LinkedIn profile data and, with just three prompts, have Kiro build a modern, cloud-native static portfolio website using Next.js and Tailwind CSS and deploy it on S3.

latest.title: Start Your Security Incident Response Plan Today!
latest.description: Everything you need to know to start building incident response capability — in one read.

latest.title: ANS-C01 Exam Review: Is It Worth Your Investment?
latest.description: Considering the AWS Certified Advanced Networking - Specialty (ANS-C01)? This review covers exam topics, difficulty, and why it matters for cloud careers.

latest.title: Amazon S3 Files: from Kafka to S3 via NFS
latest.description: A hands-on demo of Amazon S3 Files with Confluent Cloud Kafka, Lambda, and AWS CDK. I show how Kafka events can be written to an S3-backed NFS mount using normal filesystem calls, what CDK still gets wrong today, and how cold vs warm reads behave for small and large files in real runs.

latest.title: Why Confidence Thresholds Are Not Governance: The Escalation Trap in Multi-Agent Systems
latest.description: Your agent decides when to ask for help. That decision is the governance problem.

latest.title: Unlock AWS Cost Efficiency with Kiro
latest.description: At FinOps X, Stephanie Gooch, delved into the capabilities of Amazon Kiro for enhancing cost efficiency in cloud infrastructure. If you missed it, here are the essential takeaways to get you up to speed.

latest.title: Como Rastrear Logins de Usuários no AWS Cognito Usando o Trigger Post Authentication
latest.description: Estratégia em duas fases que combina uma chamada de API pré-autenticação para capturar o IP do cliente com o trigger Lambda Post Authentication do Cognito para construir uma trilha de auditoria completa no DynamoDB.

latest.title: The Git habits that made reviewers trust me before they read a single line of code
latest.description: How a structured branching strategy, conventional commits, and knowing when to use cherry-pick instead of a full merge helped me stand out when contributing to projects on GitHub, GitLab, Azure DevOps, and AWS CodeCommit.

trending.title: Introducing Article View Counts on AWS Builder Center
trending.description: You can now see how many builders are reading your articles, giving you a real metric to understand the reach of your content.

trending.title: The Git habits that made reviewers trust me before they read a single line of code
trending.description: How a structured branching strategy, conventional commits, and knowing when to use cherry-pick instead of a full merge helped me stand out when contributing to projects on GitHub, GitLab, Azure DevOps, and AWS CodeCommit.

trending.title: Construye con Strands Agents en Nerdearla Chile 2026
trending.description: Crea tu primer proyecto con Strands Agents en Nerdearla del 17 y 18 de Abril 2026 en Centro GAM, Santiago, Chile.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Caligo Dynamics - AI Powered Autonomous Drone Swarm for Emergency Response
trending.description: When a fire breaks out, firefighters often enter buildings blindly, unable to see victims, hazards, or even the way out. This project uses AI-powered drone swarms built with ROS2, PX4, Kiro, and Amazon Bedrock to detect fires, locate civilians, map dangerous environments, and help emergency teams contain fires before lives are lost.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: RTC — Runtime Trust Calibrator
trending.description: Most AI failures aren’t wrong answers—they’re confident answers given under uncertainty. RTC introduces a runtime layer that calibrates how strongly AI systems commit to what they say.

trending.title: Revolutionizing Email Productivity with AI-Powered Automation through CLI
trending.description: As a developer facing email overload, I built a solution for the Q Developer Challenge #1: email management. What began as a simple CLI tool grew into an AI-powered system that has transformed my workflow.

trending.title: El problema de los Small Files: Guía de optimización en S3
trending.description: Descubre por qué el exceso de archivos pequeños destruye el rendimiento de Spark, Glue y Athena. Aprende estrategias de compactación, control de particionamiento y optimización de tamaño (128MB-512MB) para reducir costos y acelerar tus pipelines de datos hasta 10 veces.

trending.title: Cómo crear un agente de IA desde cero. Open source, local y gratis.
trending.description: De un modelo que solo responde a uno que busca, razona y recuerda. Todo con código que puedes leer, forkear y contribuir.
